rationale: The notebook gives a broad and practical Online Retail analysis: cleaning, time/geography/product/customer EDA, RFM segmentation, revenue concentration, and churn-style simulations. It is useful as a business dashboard and covers the dataset well, but the core finding is a fairly standard concentration/RFM story rather than a surprising single insight. The work is solid, but the narrative and rigor are more walkthrough-like than exceptional.
